title: Goliath Games Sequence | Five-in-a-row Fun for Everyone! | Family Strategy Game | For 2 or More Players, Ages 7+, White
features: Play a card from your hand, and place a chip on a corresponding space on the game board - when you have five in a row, it’s a SEQUENCE
Each player or team tries to score the required number of five-card SEQUENCES before their opponents
Easy enough for children, challenging for adults
Exciting gameplay develops STEM skills like strategy
description: From the manufacturer SEQUENCE Contents: Folding Game Board, 2 Decks of SEQUENCE Playing Cards, 135 Playing Chips, Complete Instructions SEQUENCE by Goliath Ages 7 and up, 2-12 players It's fun, it's challenging, it's exciting, it's SEQUENCE! Play a card from your hand, and place a chip on a corresponding space on the game board. When you have five in a row, it's a SEQUENCE. Learn to block your opponents or remove their chips, and watch out for the Jacks - they're wild! With a little strategy and luck, you'll be a winner. This exciting game of strategy is fun for the whole family Great for individual or team play Easy enough for kids and challenging enough for adults Playing with SEQUENCE Develops STEM skills like strategy Players select a card of their choice from their hand and place it face up on a discard pile. Then they place a chip on the corresponding space on the board. Each card is pictured twice on the game board, so choose your space wisely! Jacks add excitement to gameplay! Jacks with two eyes are wild and can be used to place a chip on any space on the board. A one-eyed Jack can be played to remove an opponent's chip from the board. Keep in mind, you cannot remove a chip from a completed SEQUENCE. Winning the game The first player or team to score the required number of five-card SEQUENCES wins the game. It's fun, it's challenging, it's exciting - it's SEQUENCE!
